episodes.title: Epstein Survivor: The Evil She Saw at 14 Has Stayed Hidden Until Now
episodes.description:
Marina Lacerda was 14 when Jeffrey Epstein found her. She became Minor Victim #1 in the case that should have put him away forever. Instead, he took a deal - because if he didn't, she was going to the stand. For nearly 20 years she stayed silent. The FBI came twice. She nearly died hiding it. Then she walked into the United States Capitol and told the world everything she saw.
